meaning: n.地峡区域之居民adj.地峡的,靠近地峡的,形成地峡的
examples: The latest and most controversial of the three scripts is Isthmian.
The latest and most controversial of the three scripts is Isthmian (see image).
Not so, say two Americans who have won a concession to get Panama's own rusting trans-isthmian railway working again.
By 1899 the Americans were taking the lead: the Isthmian Canal Commission told Congress that a route through Nicaragua, not Panama, was best for ships Pacific-bound.
